diagrams.title: Fundamental Circuit Formation
diagrams.description: Shows a tree (bold edges) with one chord (dotted) added to form a fundamental circuit
elements: Tree edges: T1, T2, T3, T4
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how adding one non-tree edge creates exactly one fundamental circuit

diagrams.title: Circuit Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: F-matrix table layout showing rows as fundamental circuits and columns as edges
elements: 1 marks where edge is in circuit
0 marks where edge is not in circuit
diagrams.purpose: Understand the structure and interpretation of F-matrix entries

diagrams.title: Cycle Space Visualization
diagrams.description: Three overlapping circles representing different circuits, showing how combination (XOR) creates new circuits
diagrams.purpose: Understand cycle space as vector space and operation of adding circuits
